Document: docs/governance/finance-committee-charter.md. Purpose: Define Finance Committee purpose, responsibilities, monthly review, software ownership, and reporting.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs bylaw review. Review needed by: Finance Committee, Pastor, Deacons. Priority: High. Notes: Needs confirmation against bylaws and church practice.. Document: docs/governance/personnel-committee-role.md. Purpose: Clarify Personnel Committee role in finance-related staffing and evaluations.. Owner: Personnel Committee. Status: Needs Personnel input. Review needed by: Personnel Committee, Nominating Committee, Finance Committee. Priority: Medium. Notes: Should document how Personnel will use the already-granted hiring authority and coordinate with Nominating under the motion.. Document: docs/roles/treasurer-vs-bookkeeper-duty-split.md. Purpose: Compare current Treasurer duties with proposed Treasurer, Bookkeeper, committee, and vendor responsibilities.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs committee input. Priority: High. Notes: Should be clarified during stabilization.. Document: docs/roles/bookkeeper-financial-administrator-job-description.md. Purpose: Draft operational paid Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator role.. Owner: Personnel Committee. Status: Needs Finance input. Review needed by: Personnel Committee, Nominating Committee, Finance Committee. Priority: High. Notes: Authorized role with $150/week limit; Personnel needs Finance direction on duties, access, controls, and budget impact before posting/final hiring.. Status: Needs Personnel input. Review needed by: Personnel Committee. Priority: Medium. Notes: Use to decide whether this format should become the standard for future KBC job descriptions.. Owner: Personnel Committee. Status: Needs Personnel input. Review needed by: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee, Pastor. Priority: High. Notes: Adapted from prior KBC Custodian hiring materials; Finance should confirm duties and controls before interviews.. Document: docs/roles/bookkeeper-job-application.md. Purpose: Draft application for paid Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator.. Owner: Personnel Committee. Status: Needs Personnel input. Review needed by: Personnel Committee. Priority: High. Notes: Needs final screening, confidentiality, background-check, classification, and hiring-process language.. Document: docs/communications/personnel-committee-packet.md. Purpose: Give Personnel Committee a review packet for authorized paid Bookkeeper materials.. Owner: Personnel Committee. Status: Ready for review. Review needed by: Personnel Committee. Priority: High. Notes: Good starting point for finalizing job description, application, hiring process, and compensation.. Document: docs/communications/finance-committee-packet.md.
